title: Conditional statements
description: if / else if / else and the ternary.

questions.explanation: 5 is not < 0, not === 0, so it falls to else → 'pos'.
if (x = 5) assigns 5 to x — a silent bug. Use === for comparison.

questions.prompt: Which is an EXPRESSION (returns a value)?
questions.explanation: Comparisons and ternaries are expressions. if statements are not.
0 is falsy — the else branch fires.
Dangling else binds to the NEAREST if. Here it binds to x > 5, so when x=3 → 'small'.

questions.prompt: This should log 'adult' only when age is 18 or more. Fix it.
questions.hint: Use >= for comparison, not = which is assignment.

questions.explanation: && short-circuits: only runs the right side when the left is truthy.
